THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSALES, CARMELA BEY, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 139 SWISS STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $6,638.92 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,638.92, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & FEES. $6638.92 TO BE PAID TO PLTF IN 12 INSTALLMTS OF $553.24 STARTING 2/20/97. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. GENERAL RELEASE. SECURITY DEPOSIT HANDLED ACCDG TO LAW. IF DEFTS COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS, PLTF WILL VACATE JUDGMNT & DISMISS W/PREJUDICE.
